positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a forest cabin nestled amongst giant, abstract mushrooms. The art style is Scandinavian folk art meets Art Deco linocut print. Use strong, clean silhouette shapes with high contrast black ink on a creamy off-white background. Composition should be symmetrical and central, emphasizing geometric patterns and stylized nature elements like stylized ferns, winding paths, and simplified mountain peaks visible in the distance. Use a limited palette of deep emerald green, burnt sienna, and slate grey for color accents. Highly detailed, clean lines, suitable for large-scale apparel printing, vector-like quality, intricate linework, solid color blocks.
negative: blur, photorealistic, excessive detail, grain, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, realistic anatomy, messy, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, dirty
